theme_and_archetype.description: A high-end, bespoke tailoring boutique dashboard that balances the aesthetic beauty of a fashion portfolio with the data-density required for an admin CRM. Focuses on warm terracotta, rust, and tan tones to evoke artisanal craftsmanship.

surface_strategies.header: bg-[#FDFBF7]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#EFEBE4] sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.card: bg-white border border-[#EFEBE4] shadow-[0_4px_24px_-8px_rgba(139,102,85,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_-8px_rgba(139,102,85,0.12)] hover:-translate-y-1
surface_strategies.input: bg-[#F7F2EB] border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-[#C05C3B] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C05C3B]/20 transition-all
surface_strategies.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#EFEBE4] text-[#2D2420] hover:border-[#C05C3B] hover:text-[#C05C3B] transition-all

components_customization.tables: Go cardless. Use subtle borders on rows (`border-b border-[#EFEBE4]`). Headers should be `text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[#8A7D76] bg-[#F7F2EB] py-4 px-6`.
components_customization.forms: Use highly structured multi-column layouts for the Order Creation form (measurements take up 2 cols, neck designs side-by-side). Labels should be subtle. Inputs should be warm-tinted and softly rounded.
components_customization.badges: For order statuses (WIP, Due, Delivered): Soft pastel backgrounds with dark, high-contrast text. E.g., WIP = `bg-[#D19B5A]/20 text-[#8C3B24]`. Warning (2 days before) = `bg-[#B85450]/15 text-[#B85450]`.
components_customization.charts: Recharts with warm palettes. Bars: #C05C3B and #D19B5A. Lines: smooth, with area gradients under them.

animations.page_load: framer-motion standard fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.5, staggerChildren: 0.1)
animations.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on active (`active:scale-95`).

login_hero.description: Fashion designer working on patterns in her studio. Perfect for login background or about section.

gallery_1.description: Woman in blue sari dress, showcasing traditional tailoring.

gallery_2.description: Women in beautiful sarees, great for gallery.

texture_bg.description: Terracotta texture for overlay or secondary backgrounds in the customer portal.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided. Do NOT default to standard blue/gray SaaS colors. Use the terracotta and warm stone colors to convey an artisanal tailoring boutique.
For the Customer Portal: Create an elegant, editorial feel using Cormorant Garamond for headings. Generous whitespace, beautiful imagery, and clear order tracking are paramount.

For the Admin Dashboard: Data density is needed. Use Manrope for data tables. Implement Shadcn UI components but heavily override borders and backgrounds to match the #EFEBE4 border color and #FFFFFF/#F7F2EB backgrounds.
Implement the large order form carefully: group measurements logically (Neck, Sleeves, Body) using CSS Grids. Incorporate standard tailwind-compatible radio buttons and select menus.
Always apply `data-testid` to interactive elements. E.g., `data-testid='login-button'`, `data-testid='add-measurement-button'`.
Use standard `lucide-react` icons. Make sure the WhatsApp button clearly floats or is prominently displayed on the customer portal.
In the Reports Dashboard, use Recharts with our #C05C3B and #D19B5A colors. Include logic to highlight orders within 2 days of delivery using a distinct warning style (#D4A373).
